headline: A Look At Deckers Outdoor (DECK) Valuation After UGG Golden Collection Launch
summary: Why UGG’s Golden Collection Launch Matters for Deckers Outdoor Stock Deckers Outdoor (DECK) is back in the spotlight after its UGG division introduced the Spring 2026 Golden Collection, extending the classic shearling comfort into warm weather sandals and clogs. For investors, this collection highlights how Deckers is trying to keep the UGG brand relevant year round by using refreshed silhouettes, recycled materials, and recognizable campaign faces to support consumer interest beyond the...
